abstract: The component for displaying a set of images as tiles in no particular order.
overview:
## Discussion

Use the `Mosaic` component to display a group of images in no particular order. (To display a group of images in a particular order, use the `Gallery` component.) Users can tap an image in a mosaic to see a full-screen version.



### Example

items.description: Display five images as mosaic tiles.
items.name: Adding a Mosaic of Images

items.description: The component for displaying a sequence of images in a specific order as a horizontal strip.
items.name: Gallery

items.description: An object used in a gallery or mosaic component for displaying an individual image.
items.name: GalleryItem

title: Mosaic
